rule: hit iff kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7; total_hits>=1 -> FAIL

results.title: ToneUnit: Speech Discretization for Tonal Language Speech Synthesis (2024/06)
results.note: Discretizes speech with tone markers for tonal-language synthesis via CTC; uses tone-aware quantized units but as variable phone+tone labels with CTC, not a fixed 3-class (H/M/L) categorical pitch-bucket SSL pretraining target derived from F0 binning. Partial overlap on tonal-language-aware discrete units; lacks the 3-bucket bottleneck pretraining mechanism.

results.title: Do Discrete SSL Speech Representations Capture Tone Distinctions? (UKRI 2024/10)
results.note: Analysis/probing of whether existing discrete SSL tokens encode tone; does not propose a 3-class pitch-bucket pretraining objective. Diagnostic study, not a method matching the candidate.

results.title: Encoding of Lexical Tone in Self-Supervised Models of Spoken Language
results.note: Probes lexical-tone encoding in SSL models; analysis only, no 3-bucket categorical pitch target pretraining objective.

results.title: How Far Do SSL Speech Models Listen for Tone? (2025/11)
results.note: Studies temporal context for tone in SSL models; no categorical 3-class pitch-bucket pretraining target.

results.title: Benchmarking Prosody Encoding in Discrete Speech Tokens (2025/08)
results.note: Benchmark of prosody encoding in existing discrete speech tokens; not a new 3-bucket SSL pretraining objective.

results.title: Pretraining Language/Phonetic/Tonal Relationships in SSL Speech Models (2025/06)
results.note: Investigates information separation during pretraining; does not introduce 3-class H/M/L pitch-bucket categorical target.

results.title: Seamless Language Expansion Multilingual Mastery in SSL (2024/06)
results.note: Multilingual SSL expansion; not specifically tonal-language pitch-bucket pretraining.

results.title: CantoASR Prosody-Aware ASR-LALM Low-Resource Cantonese (2025/11)
results.note: Uses F0+slope+duration as continuous prosody features for tone-aware Cantonese ASR within an ASR-LALM; does not quantize F0 into a 3-symbol categorical H/M/L pretraining target as an SSL bottleneck objective. Related but mechanistically different (continuous prosody features, fine-tuned ASR-LALM, not pretraining bottleneck).
